name: Scrim
description: Backdrop overlay component used to obscure underlying content and focus attention on foreground content.

open.description: Controls scrim visibility. Returns null when false.

fixed.description: When true, scrim is bound to document viewport; otherwise it is bound to nearest positioned ancestor.

children.description: Optional foreground content rendered above scrim, such as spinner or action controls.

onClick.description: Optional click handler, commonly used to dismiss overlay states.

slots.default: Optional child content to display above the scrim overlay.

keyboard: No direct keyboard interaction defined by Scrim itself
aria: No component-specific accessibility guidance is defined
If Scrim is dismissible, provide keyboard-accessible dismissal mechanism in associated foreground UI
